chat_messages.content: What the heck is wrong with you guys. Pay me now! This is ridiculous.

brief.title: Quick Unboxing for Activewear
brief.product_description: Premium high-waisted seamless leggings with side pockets.
brief.detailed_requirements: We are looking for a highly engaging, well-lit unboxing video showing the premium packaging and the stretchability of the leggings. Please highlight the side pockets and the seamless design.

ugc_briefs.title: Quick Unboxing for Activewear
ugc_briefs.product_description: Premium high-waisted seamless leggings with side pockets.
ugc_briefs.detailed_requirements: We are looking for a highly engaging, well-lit unboxing video showing the premium packaging and the stretchability of the leggings. Please highlight the side pockets and the seamless design.

ugc_briefs.title: Protein Powder review
ugc_briefs.product_description: High-quality whey protein powder for muscle recovery.
ugc_briefs.detailed_requirements: Show yourself mixing the powder with water or milk in a shaker. Take a sip and talk about the taste and how it helps you recover after a workout.
